description_long: This is a rectangular wooden filing cabinet with a natural wood grain finish, featuring a flat top and two vertical doors on the front. The cabinet is equipped with a metal key lock mechanism at the top center of the doors, providing secure storage. The handles are slim, vertical wooden bars integrated into the door design, blending seamlessly with the cabinet's aesthetic. The sides and back are plain, with the wood grain pattern continuing uninterrupted. The top surface is flat and can be used to support additional objects or documents. The overall construction suggests it is sturdy and suitable for storing files or office supplies in an organized manner.
description: A wooden filing cabinet with two front doors, vertical handles, and a key lock, finished in a natural wood grain pattern.
description_view_0: Side view showing the slanted top edge and uninterrupted wood grain pattern.
description_view_1: Front view displaying two vertical doors, slim vertical handles, and a central key lock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the slanted top edge and wood grain finish.
description_view_3: Rear view with a plain, flat wood panel and no visible handles or locks.
